understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to occupy all '+' goal tiles with selectable pieces simultaneously in each level. The run failed because steps ran out before placing any piece onto a goal, likely due to repeatedly switching selection without making progress.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN to shift the currently selected piece in the grid. CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the clicked coordinates, provided the target position contains a selectable piece; clicking on a non-selectable or blocked tile fails or has no effect. Obstacles block movement, and pieces cannot overlap. Each level has a finite step budget, and the game ends when steps reach zero or all goals are occupied.
